profile.name: NJIKAM MBEHOU Chouaibou
bio: Motivated Software Engineer with strong experience in full-stack development, microservices architecture, and cloud deployment. Skilled in designing scalable web and mobile applications using React, .NET, Spring Boot, and AWS.
Passionate about creating inclusive and efficient digital solutions for businesses and communities. Strong communicator and problem-solver with a commitment to continuous learning and innovation.

about.title: Building scalable systems, one service at a time.
paragraphs: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in microservices architecture, cloud deployment, and modern web and mobile development. My journey spans from building core banking platforms to deploying digital transformation tools for real businesses.
I work across the full stack — React and Next.js on the frontend, ASP.NET Core and Spring Boot on the backend, PostgreSQL and SQL Server for data, Docker and AWS for infrastructure.

I graduated with a Master's in Software Engineering from the National Advanced School of Engineering, Douala (July 2025), and I bring both academic rigor and hands-on production experience to every project.

points: Designed and developed core banking application features as part of a full-stack team, focusing on check management and critical banking services
Built responsive web interfaces using ASP.NET Razor Pages for server-side rendered frontend components
Implemented backend services and business logic using ASP.NET Core, ensuring high performance and data integrity
Developed Check Management microservices including check issuance, clearance, cancellation tracking, and fraud detection workflows
Integrated microservices via RESTful APIs, enabling modular and loosely coupled service communication
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure compliance with banking standards and secure transaction processing
Worked as a frontend developer building modern web interfaces using Next.js
Developed and maintained responsive UI components and page-level features for cloud-based applications
Collaborated with backend teams to integrate REST APIs and optimize data fetching strategies
Designed and implemented a Trade Force Automation platform as part of a major digital transformation initiative
Developed responsive web and mobile applications using React, React Native, and Spring Boot
Designed a Microservices architecture enabling modular RESTful APIs and better scalability
Implemented user management, analytics, and secure authentication services

experiences.company: CIME — Import Center of Medium-Sized Enterprises
points: Developed a digital library system to archive past records and improve data retrieval efficiency
Collaborated within the IT service team to enhance the center's digital infrastructure
Designed and implemented responsive web interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS
Participated in requirements analysis, planning, and implementation phases
Planned and developed a React-based web interface for interacting with an African robot prototype
Improved user engagement through optimized UI design and accessibility enhancements
Integrated real-time robot control features using Web APIs and WebSockets

projects.title: TRUESOFT Core Banking System
projects.description: A modern, responsive full-stack web application for core banking operations, specializing in Check Management and banking microservices, built with ASP.NET Core Razor Pages and Web API.
projects.caseStudy:
Designed and implemented Check Management microservices including check issuance, clearance tracking, cancellation workflows, and fraud detection alerts.

Built responsive admin and teller dashboards using ASP.NET Razor Pages for server-side rendered views. Developed dynamic pages for check lifecycle management, transaction history, and customer account views.

Integrated frontend Razor Pages with backend microservices via RESTful APIs for real-time data synchronization. Implemented additional microservices for transaction logging, account validation, balance inquiries, and reporting.

Enabled inter-service communication using asynchronous messaging patterns for better scalability and fault tolerance. Ensured secure data handling with role-based access control for tellers, branch managers, and system administrators.

Impact: Digitized and streamlined check processing workflows, reducing manual errors and processing time. Provided a scalable, modular core banking platform that improved transaction traceability and operational efficiency.

projects.title: University Management System
projects.description: A modern, responsive frontend web application to manage university operations — students, courses, departments, and academic data — built with Next.js for EPFPS Meiganga.
projects.caseStudy:
Designed and implemented reusable UI components using Tailwind CSS. Developed dynamic pages for student management, course listings, and department dashboards.

Integrated frontend with backend APIs for data fetching and state management. Implemented role-based UI views for administrators, professors, and students.

Ensured responsive design and cross-browser compatibility across all pages.

Impact: Improved usability and efficiency of university administration workflows, providing a scalable and user-friendly interface for managing academic information.

projects.title: Trade Force Automation
projects.description: A web-based platform to digitalize and streamline the activities of sales agents — real-time tracking, structured data collection on prospects and clients, and performance analytics.
projects.caseStudy:
Developed a dashboard interface for real-time tracking of field agents' locations and activities, improving supervision and coordination.

Implemented dynamic forms for collecting structured data on prospects and clients during visits, enhancing CRM capabilities.

Built performance analytics features to assess agent efficiency and sales trends, aiding managerial decision-making. Integrated secure authentication and user role management for sales agents and managers.

Impact: Improved productivity and transparency of sales operations, reduced paperwork, and enabled data-driven decision-making through digital tools.

projects.title: Smart Inventory Management System
projects.description: A web-based inventory management system built with ASP.NET Core and SQL Server to help small shops track products, suppliers, and sales efficiently.
projects.caseStudy:
Built CRUD modules for product and supplier management, integrated authentication with role-based access, and developed an analytics dashboard for sales reporting.

Impact: Simplified business operations and reduced manual errors in stock management for small retail businesses.

projects.title: Épargne+ Online Banking App
projects.description: A digital savings platform tailored for small businesses, enabling users to make contributions starting from 100 FCFA — promoting financial inclusion for micro-entrepreneurs.
projects.caseStudy:
Designed clean, user-friendly interface mockups using Figma, optimized for simplicity and accessibility. Created intuitive user flows for account setup, savings contributions, and transaction history.

Assisted in deploying the application on AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, Route 53) ensuring reliability and accessibility.

Impact: Delivered a functional and scalable app interface that empowers small business owners to manage their savings easily with secure, stable cloud-based access.

projects.title: African Robot Web Interface
projects.description: A React web interface to interact with an African robot model — send commands, monitor real-time status updates, and track command history via WebSockets.
projects.caseStudy:
Created a control panel interface to send commands and monitor the robot's actions and status updates. Built a Command History log for tracking user interactions.

Integrated real-time robot data using WebSocket for live updates, providing an engaging and responsive user experience.

Impact: Enhanced interaction with robotics technology by creating a structured, easy-to-navigate web interface.

projects.title: Speech Recognition Mobile Interface
projects.description: A React Native mobile application with integrated speech recognition, enabling hands-free voice command processing with real-time visual feedback.
projects.caseStudy:
Built a custom React Native component to capture and process voice commands in real-time, displaying recognized text and responses. Designed an intuitive interface providing visual feedback on the app's listening status.

Implemented a settings screen for users to adjust language and recognition sensitivity, improving accessibility and control.

Impact: Created a seamless, voice-activated experience paving the way for further AI integration in mobile applications.
